sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25573" key="diapneusto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δια-πνευστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n25573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily dissipated, volatile,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀήρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg007:36:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Sens.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
